description: Configure the 'RadiationPlanningCore' project (located at `~/eclipse-workspace/RadiationPlanningCore`) to enforce strict safety standards by treating specific warnings as errors. Enable project-specific Java Compiler settings to set both 'Resource leak' and 'Potential null pointer access' to the Error level. Verify the configuration by ensuring these issues are reported as errors in 'DosimetryCalculator.java'.
